title: caladenia × spectabilis
intro: Caladenia × spectabilis, also known as the 'Spectabilis Spotted Orchid', is a hybrid orchid species resulting from the cross between Caladenia attingens and Caladenia flava. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits associated with Caladenia × spectabilis include its potential to alleviate symptoms of fever, pain, and inflammation, as well as its ability to support immune function. The herbal preparations of Caladenia × spectabilis often involve drying and powdering the plant, which can then be used in teas, infusions, or as a topical treatment.
